auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetSubtitle: We’ll email you a link to set a new password.
auth.resetSent: If that email has an account, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetConfirmSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetConfirmDone: Password reset. You can now log in.
auth.resetTokenMissing: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.verifyFailed: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verifyBannerHint: Some features are gated until you confirm it.
auth.verifyResent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account settings.
profile.avatarHint: PNG or JPG, up to ~0.5 MB.
profile.signInToManage: Log in to manage your profile.
profile.changeEmailHint: We’ll send a verification link to the new address. Your current email stays active until you confirm.
profile.emailChangeRequested: Verification link sent. Check the new inbox.
profile.dataExportHint: Download a JSON file with everything we store about your account (profile, garage, plans, setups, goals).
profile.dangerZoneHint: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data is removed.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmBody: This permanently deletes your account and everything in it — garage, plans, setups, goals. This cannot be undone. Type your password to confirm.
profile.deleteAccountSuccess: Account deleted. Sorry to see you go.

themeConfig.title: Custom theme
themeConfig.desc: Tune the colors and font used by the Custom theme.
themeConfig.activate: Switch to the custom theme to see your changes.

fuel.title: Fuel Planner
fuel.subtitle: Work out your stints, pit stops, and fuel loads before the race.
fuel.calcDesc: Plan pit stops and fuel loads for a race.
fuel.strategyHint: Balanced splits stints evenly; undercut pits early on a short first stint; overcut runs the first stint long.
fuel.strategyInfoBalanced: Balanced — even stints, minimal risk. Best default when you race in clean air or manage traffic well; tires and fuel wear evenly.
fuel.strategyInfoUndercut: Undercut — pit before your rival. Fresh tires are fastest on their first laps, so you gain time while they stay out. Use it when you are stuck behind someone and the track is clear for your out-lap.
fuel.strategyInfoOvercut: Overcut — stay out longer than your rival. Works when tire wear is low, your pace holds on old tires, or their out-lap will hit traffic. Also useful if a caution/pace phase is likely.
fuel.rulesDesc: Some series mandate pit stops or pit windows — model them here.

planner.title: Race Planner
planner.subtitle: The season at a glance — each series' weekly tracks, with what you own highlighted.
planner.canRunHint: weeks you own the track for
planner.noCar: no car owned for this class
planner.noFavorites: No favorite series yet — star some in the garage, or switch to All series.
planner.thisWeekSubtitle: Your favorite series racing this week — plan them in a tap.
planner.thisWeekEmpty: Nothing this week. Star some series in the garage to see them here.

setups.title: Setups Showroom
setups.subtitle: Save your car setups and share the good ones with everyone.
setups.addHint: Paste an exported setup or its key values; add notes so others know what it is for.
setups.name: Name
setups.dataHint: Paste the setup export (.sto contents) or the key values here.
setups.generateHint: Generate a starting setup for this car and track
setups.packHint: Generate a safe & pro setup for each session type (race, qual, endurance, rain)
setups.packProOnly: Setup pack generation is a Pro feature.
setups.packProOnlyHint: Upgrade to Pro to generate setup packs.

goals.title: Goal Tracker
goals.subtitle: Set season goals and track your progress toward them.
goals.empty: No goals yet — add one to start tracking.
goals.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Reach a B road license
goals.errTarget: Target must be zero or more.
goals.errCurrent: Progress must be zero or more.

footer.disclaimer: Apex is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by iRacing.com Motorsport Simulations, LLC. "iRacing" is a trademark of its respective owner, used here only to describe compatibility.

about.title: About Apex
about.p1: Apex is a companion app for sim racers. It helps you plan and get faster: a fuel & stint calculator, a setup generator, a full season planner, your garage, and season goals — in one place.
about.p2: The core tools work without linking any external account. Apex is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by iRacing.com Motorsport Simulations, LLC.

billing.title: Upgrade to Pro
billing.subtitle: Unlock advanced race-prep workflows. Start with setup pack generation and upcoming Pro planner expansions.
billing.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Your subscription is set to cancel at period end.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of Apex (the "Service"). By creating an account or using the Service you agree to them. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

service.b: Apex is a companion app for sim racers: a fuel & stint calculator, setup generator, season planner, garage, and goal tracking. Some features are offered on a free tier and others as part of a paid subscription.

accounts.b: You are responsible for the activity under your account and for keeping your password confidential. Provide accurate information and notify us of any unauthorized use. You must be old enough to form a binding contract in your jurisdiction.

content.b: You retain ownership of the setups, goals, plans, and other content you create. By marking content as public (e.g. publishing a setup to the showroom) you grant us a non-exclusive license to host and display it to other users. You are responsible for the content you upload.

acceptable.b: Do not misuse the Service: no unlawful activity, no attempts to break, overload, or reverse-engineer it, and no infringement of others' rights.

thirdParty.b: Apex is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by iRacing.com Motorsport Simulations, LLC. Any third-party names are used only to describe compatibility.

subscriptions.b: Paid plans renew until cancelled. Prices and included features may change; we will give notice of material changes. Except where required by law, fees already paid are non-refundable.

warranty.b: The Service is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages, and our total liability is limited to the amount you paid in the twelve months before the claim.

changes.b: We may update these Terms; continued use after changes means you accept them. Questions? Contact us at the support address listed on our site.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what data Apex collects, why, and your choices. We aim to collect only what the Service needs to work.

collect.b: Account: your email address and a securely hashed password. Your content: setups, goals, race plans, and garage selections you create. Technical: basic request logs (e.g. IP address, timestamps) needed for security and reliability.

why.b: To provide the Service (authenticate you, store your work), to keep it secure (rate limiting, abuse prevention), and — for subscribers — to manage billing.

cookies.b: We use a single essential cookie to keep you signed in. If product analytics are enabled, an analytics provider (e.g. Yandex Metrica) may set its own cookies; analytics are off unless configured.

thirdParties.b: Catalog reference data may be sourced from third parties; we do not sell your personal data. When you link an external account (e.g. iRacing via its official API), we access only what you authorize.

retention.b: We keep your data while your account is active. You can request deletion, and we remove your account and associated content, except where we must retain records to comply with law.

rights.b: Subject to your jurisdiction, you may request access to, correction of, export of, or deletion of your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

security.b: Passwords are hashed, sessions are token-based and revoked on password change, and any linked third-party credentials are encrypted at rest. No system is perfectly secure, but we take reasonable measures to protect your data.

changes.b: We may update this policy and will note the date above. Questions or requests? Contact us at the support address listed on our site.
